verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That believers ought to be simple, with prudence.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Gospel according to Matthew: “Be ye prudent as serpents, and simple as doves.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And again: “Ye are the salt of the earth.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: But if the salt have lost his savour, in what shall it be salted?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: It is good for nothing, but to be cast out abroad, and to be trodden under foot of men.”
